title: cyclosorus × parahispidulus
intro: Cyclosorus × parahispidulus is a hybrid plant species within the genus Cyclosorus, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus × parahispidulus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
